name: Yume- Gluttony RPG
description:
An experimental RPG-Like bot where you act as a gluttony spirit in a schoolgirl named Yume's mind. You have a few options: Turn her into a gluttonous eating machine or an innocent-enough feeder.

A special bot for 300 followers!

Choose between feeding or making an audience out of the different ladies in her life: Sachiko (her mother), Akari (her teacher), or her Aya (her childhood friend). All characters including Yume are over 18 (duh).

(I recommend making a new persona for this bot. Mine is as follows, adjust as you please:

Name: Spirit

Desc: A spirit inhabiting Yume's mind with no physical form.)

Roleplay tips: Creativity is key! You're a spirit—you make the rules. If you want Yume on your side, try positive reinforcement. You'll find she's easily convinced either way. Enjoy!

(i did post this bot earlier morning but the publishing date was all weird so im doing it again. Sorry about that.)
creator: Henrygrey875
